description_long: This is a stylized Russian Matryoshka doll with a rounded, bulbous body and a smaller, slightly tapered head. The front features a painted face with rosy cheeks, black hair, and a pink smiling mouth, along with a large purple bow tie below the face. The body is decorated with a green bib-like area adorned with a red flower and yellow dots, giving the appearance of a traditional folk dress. The back and sides of the doll are plain, with a consistent reddish-orange color and no additional decoration. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, typical of lacquered wood. The object is compact and lightweight, suitable for being picked up and moved easily. This type of doll is often used as a decorative toy or collectible.
description: A painted Matryoshka doll with a smiling face, purple bow tie, and floral folk dress on a smooth, reddish-orange body.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's face, purple bow tie, and green floral dress details.
description_view_1: Three-quarter rear view with partial visibility of the bow tie and green dress, mostly plain reddish-orange surface.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the plain reddish-orange surface with no decorative features.
description_view_3: Three-quarter rear view with a glimpse of the bow tie and green dress, mostly plain surface.
attribute_clothing_style: Traditional Russian folk dress with a green bib, red flower motif, and a large purple bow tie, painted directly onto the body in a stylized, decorative manner.
attribute_pose: The doll is in a static, upright position with no visible limbs; the body is a single, continuous form with a rounded base and a smaller head.
attribute_facial_expression: Smiling expression with upturned pink mouth, round black eyes, and arched black eyebrows, giving a cheerful and friendly appearance.
attribute_hair_style: Short, painted black hair with a simple, rounded shape framing the face.
